title: GoCell Journey Descriptor
description: Defines a Journey, the acceptance truth. A Journey specifies what 'done' means for a user-facing capability. It is not a dependency truth.

id.description: Unique journey identifier. Must start with 'J-'.

goal.description: Human-readable goal describing what the journey achieves.

owner.description: Team and role responsible for the journey.

cells.description: Routing anchors: cells involved in this journey. This is best-effort, not an exhaustive list.

contracts.description: Acceptance curation: contracts directly asserted by passCriteria. Not the full dependency graph.

passCriteria.description: Acceptance criteria. Each entry defines a check that must pass for the journey to be considered complete.

mode.description: Whether this criterion is verified automatically or manually.

checkRef.description: Reference to an automated check. Required when mode is 'auto'.
